title: Rhetoric I.1: The Art of Persuasion
description: Rhetoric is the counterpart of dialectic. It is the faculty of observing the available means of persuasion in any given case.
introduction: Rhetoric is the counterpart of dialectic. It is the faculty of observing the available means of persuasion in any given case.

translation.text: Rhetoric is the faculty of observing in any given case the available means of persuasion.
